title: Evangelion Comic Tribute
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Comic Tribute?             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Sat Sep 04, 2021 11:40 am Can anyone point me toward a source for the Evangelion Comic Tribute?

[]: Re: Evangelion Comic Tribute?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Sep 12, 2021 2:15 pm I had a copy (I don't rate it highly), but sadly for you I gave it to the previous person who asked this question!.

[]: Re: Evangelion Comic Tribute?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Sep 12, 2021 6:18 pm You can find them online, although having read one of the two, I would not pay more than 10 bucks for it after shipping
